reviews.comment:
Lindo pero RE caro, te cobran todo, para estar sentado o ir al baño.. Desastre..
Ganas de perder clientes, porque los que saben no van más.. Lo que debería ser un servicio para ellos es dinero

(Translated by Google)
Nice but EXTREMELY expensive. They charge you for everything, even sitting down or using the restroom. It's a disaster. They're clearly trying to lose customers, because those who know what they're doing aren't coming back. What should be a service is just money to them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHcGVIdmF3EAE
